subject: affs: fix a memory leak in affs_remount

features.path_conditions: After successful kstrdup, all return paths from affs_remount must call kfree(new_opts); only the parse_options error path frees it pre-fix, leaking on success paths.
features.fit_test_reasoning: kstrdup acquires heap memory whose owner is the local variable new_opts. kfree is the matching release. Missing kfree causes a memory leak, which is exactly the resource-leak pattern (acquire->use->release). Bug is not about input validation or transformation.
